name: boeing-watch
description: Boeing Watch — independent accountability dashboard for The Boeing Company.

scripts.db:seed: wrangler d1 execute boeingwatch --remote --file=db/seed-whistleblowers.sql && wrangler d1 execute boeingwatch --remote --file=db/seed-methodology.sql
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute boeingwatch --local --file=db/seed-whistleblowers.sql && wrangler d1 execute boeingwatch --local --file=db/seed-methodology.sql
